body.purpose: Default body text, messages, prose content.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, file paths, tool names, inline code.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Workspace panels, empty state cards. Minimal lift.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Sidebar, toasts, modals. Floating global elements.

shadows.name: ring
shadows.purpose: Focus ring for all focusable elements.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Entry animations: workspace mount, panel reveal.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action: send message, confirm creation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #171717; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #171717; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 720; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #303030; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; transform: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fafafa; color: #55524c; border: 1px solid #e0dfdc; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 13px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.42; cursor: default; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis navigation item or toolbar action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #55524c; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 10px; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #ffffff; color: #171717; transform: translateX(3px); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #fff1f2; color: #be123c; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 720; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #ffe4e6; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e0dfdc; border-radius: 6px; background: #fafafa; color: #171717; padding: 9px 11px; font-size: 13px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #171717; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.12); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #77756f; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container — used for inspector blocks, file items, run cards.
components.html:
World Summary

Your world overview content here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0dfdc; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); animation: panelRise 360ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #c8c7c3; } .ds-card strong { display: block; color: #171717; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card p { color: #77756f; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; } @keyframes panelRise { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Small toggle or tag — run mode selector, agent type badge.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #55524c; border: 1px solid #e0dfdc; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 680; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #c8c7c3; background: #ffffff; color: #171717; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-chip-active { background: #ffffff; color: #171717; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #e0dfdc; }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Fixed-position notification. Slides in from right.
components.css: .ds-toast { padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 14px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.1); animation: dsSlideIn 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-toast-error { background: #fff1f2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; color: #be123c; } @keyframes dsSlideIn { from { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Centered dialog with backdrop blur scrim.
components.html:
Create World

Start a new worldbuilding project.
components.css: .ds-scrim { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 1500; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: 18px; background: rgba(24, 33, 31, 0.34); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-modal { position: relative; width: min(480px, 100%); border: 1px solid #e0dfdc; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #171717; box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.1); padding: 28px; } .ds-modal h2 { font-size: 21px; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-modal p { color: #55524c; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 18px; }

components.name: Assistant Message
components.description: Chat message from the AI assistant with left accent bar.
components.html: The forests of the North are ancient, their roots tangled with secrets older than the kingdom itself.
components.css: .ds-msg-assistant { max-width: min(820px, 88%); padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px 8px 8px 4px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.55; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0dfdc; color: #171717; align-self: flex-start; position: relative; overflow: hidden; animation: msgIn 320ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-msg-assistant::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 auto 0 0; width: 3px; background: #c8c7c3; } .ds-msg-assistant:hover { border-color: #c8c7c3; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-msg-assistant p { margin: 7px 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } @keyframes msgIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px) scale(0.98); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } }

narrative.overview: Merak WebUI 是一个铸字车间——精确、利落、每一像素都有存在的理由。它不是装饰性的设计工作室，而是一个生产文字的工厂，界面是服务于这个目的的工具。系统的美学哲学根植于单色品牌（mono-brand）：近黑就是品牌色。没有花哨的渐变强调色，没有霓虹点缀。层次来自亮度的微妙递进。组件触感是精确利落的：悬停微升，点击下沉，就像按下真实的物理按钮。动效可以华丽——spring 曲线、弹性入场、pulse 呼吸——只要不打断创作心流。
keyCharacteristics: 单色品牌系统：near-black 就是强调色
精确利落的触感交互：lift on hover, sink on press
玻璃侧边栏：唯一使用 backdrop-filter 的表面
Inter 单一字体族，通过粗细（650–900）构建层级
动效可以华丽：ease-spring、弹性入场、pulse 呼吸

rules.name: The Mono-Brand Rule
rules.body: 系统的强调色就是 near-black。没有第二个品牌色。没有渐变。Ink 在任一屏幕上占用的面积不超过 10%，它的稀缺性本身就是信号。

rules.name: The One Accent Per Context Rule
rules.body: 语义色（amber / ruby / green）每次只出现一种。不同时使用两种语义色争夺注意力。

rules.name: The Gray-Is-Not-Elegance Rule
rules.body: muted (#77756f) 只在纯白 surface 上使用。在 tinted 背景上，用更深一档的 muted-strong 或透明度叠印。

rules.name: The Single-Font Rule
rules.body: 只用 Inter 一个字体族（加等宽 Mono）。不引入衬线体。层级靠粗细和尺寸。

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow-Army Rule
rules.body: Label（10px uppercase）只用于表单字段和 Inspector 区块标题。不在每个 section 上方添加独立的小号大写 eyebrow。

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: 表面在静止状态下是平的。阴影作为状态响应出现（hover lift、全局叠加），不作为静态装饰。唯一例外是 sidebar。

rules.name: The One-Glass-Surface Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur() 只用于侧边栏。不扩散到卡片、模态框、或任何其他表面。玻璃材质是导航层的专属语言。

dos: 用 var(--ink) 作为唯一的强调色。系统不需要第二个品牌色。
用粗细（650–900）和尺寸（10–18px）构建层级，不引入第二个字体族。
让按钮 hover 时微升（translateY(-1px)）、press 时下沉（scale(0.98)）。
让表面在静止时保持平坦（flat-by-default），阴影只在交互反馈或全局叠加层出现。
用 amber-soft + amber 边框表示警告，用 ruby-soft + ruby 边框表示错误。
保持行宽 ≤75ch（约 820px）以保证长篇阅读舒适。
让动效可以华丽——spring 曲线、弹性入场、pulse 呼吸——只要不打断创作心流。
donts: 引入第二个品牌色或彩色渐变（modal primary button 是唯一例外）。
使用游戏/主播风格——霓虹色、暗色配高饱和强调色、激进渐变、游戏字体。
使用 SaaS 营销模板套路——Hero 大图、渐变 CTA、卡片阵列、social proof。
使用传统企业软件风格——密集表格、拥挤工具栏、灰底灰字、无留白。
在 sidebar 以外的任何地方使用 backdrop-filter: blur()。
嵌套阴影卡片。一层卡片 = 一个阴影或边框。
在每个 section 上方添加 tiny uppercase eyebrow。
使用 border-left 或 border-right > 1px 作为彩色装饰条。
